name: Baking Powder Biscuits I
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
2. Cut in shortening using two spatulas until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add milk to form a soft dough.
4. Turn onto lightly floured surface and knead briefly.
5. Pat into an 8-inch sheet about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut with a floured cutter.
7. Bake in a hot oven (450°F) for 12 minutes.
